text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin reigns supreme in the<n>BNW battle.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she basks in her victory, she<n>comes to
appreciate how joyful it is<n>to have equals she can
compete<n>against.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having reached the top, Narita Taishin<n>once again
realizes the importance of<n>rivalry and friendship.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She declares her next goal to be the<n>Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The year-end Grand Prix is where the<n>most
formidable racers test their<n>mettle, and Narita
Taishin wants to<n>see where she truly stands.
